definition: Services used while a program runs.
Full setting in which a program runs.
A library package model dataset or tool used by the program.
Runtime values that shape behavior without changing source code.
A named setting supplied by the operating environment.
A packaged application environment sharing a host kernel.
A restricted environment for executing code.
Ability to infer system behavior from logs metrics traces and events.
Ability to reconstruct execution under documented conditions.
Ability to run across supported environments.
A record of runtime versions platform dependencies and configuration.
